title: alchemilla jugensis
intro: Alchemilla jugensis, also known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla jugensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Alchemilla jugensis is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with herbal preparations often used to treat minor cuts, scrapes, and skin irritations.
